subcodes.first_line: O Kāẓim! The Wronged One hath verily heard thy call, thy remembrance, and thy communion with God, Who created thee and fashioned thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا کاظم قد سمع المظلوم ندآئک و ذکرک و مناجاتک مع الله الذی خلقک و سواک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant
